Major Depressive Disorder
Effexor XR (venlafaxine hydrochloride) extended-release capsules is indicated for the treatment
of major depressive disorder.
The efficacy of Effexor XR in the treatment of major depressive disorder was established in
8- and 12-week controlled trials of adult outpatients wh...

major depressive disorder (MDD). Efficacy was established in three short-term (4, 8, and 12 weeks) and
two long-term, maintenance trials.

Effexor XR is indicated in adults for the treatment of:
• Major Depressive Disorder (MDD) [see Clinical Studies (14.1)]
• Generalized Anxiety Disorder (GAD) [see Clinical Studies (14.2)]
• Social Anxiety Disorder (SAD) [see Clinical Studies (14.3)]
• Panic Disorder (PD) [see Clinical Studies (14.4)]
